exit_criteria.detail: Mirrored Brodmann 1909 Vergleichende Lokalisationslehre der Grosshirnrinde (laminae I–VI) + Mountcastle 1957 cortical column reference. Source: n6-architecture/reports/discovery/consciousness-cluster-bt.md §6.

Cluster-bt §5 table shows 11 EXACT of 13 nodes (nodes 1,2,3,4,6,7,8,9,11,12,13). Node 5 PARTIAL (rescue via τ(6)−1), node 10 MISS (designed control). Ratio = 11/13 = 84.6 % ≥ 60 % threshold. Margin 24.6 pp.

unblock_instructions_for_entry_10: Wire phi_extractor (#7) output to record per-path Φ samples for ≥2 substrates; one path MUST map to the 6-layer neural cortical column (Brodmann L=6).
Emit per-path Φ to state/phi_4path_samples.json with fields: path_id, substrate_type, L_layer (where applicable), Phi, timestamp.
